nasb.text: The Nephilim were on the earth in those days, and also afterward, when the sons of God came in to the daughters of men, and they bore children to them. Those were the mighty men who were of old, men of renown.

esv.text: The Nephilim were on the earth in those days, and also afterward, when the sons of God came in to the daughters of man and they bore children to them. These were the mighty men who were of old, the men of renown.

cnv.text: 在那些日子和以後的日子，有巨人在地上；　神的兒子和人的女子結合，就生了上古英武有名的人物。

ccb.text: 从那时起，地上出现了一些巨人，他们是上古有名的勇士，是上帝的儿子和人的女儿所生的后代。

csbs.text: 在那些日子和后来的日子，有巨人在地上；当时神的儿子们与人的女儿们结合生子；他们是古时的勇士、有名的人物。
